prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4G15T** (1.5L turbocharged inline-4 from the Mitsubishi Mirage Cyborg R) with a **Garrett GT2554R turbocharger**, custom **HKS 264° camshafts**, and a **Toda Racing forged piston kit** (8.5:1 compression ratio) for 220+ hp at 1.5 bar boost. Requires a **Mitsubishi FTO VR-4 5-speed manual transmission** swap with a **PPG close-ratio gearset** and **Nismo LSD** for drivetrain reliability.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **Spoon Sports** (Minicab-specific routing with a **Burns Stainless 4-2-1 header** and **GReddy SP2 muffler**), paired with a **Mitsubishi Evo VIII MAP sensor** and **AEM 30-0300 wideband O2 sensor** for precise AFR tuning via **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU**.

**Tein Flex Z coilovers** (Minicab-specific valving) with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** (20mm drop) and **Cusco front strut bar** to stiffen the chassis. Rear **Whiteline adjustable panhard rod** and **SuperPro poly bushings** (full kit) to eliminate flex. Brakes upgraded to **Nissan Micra K13 4-pot calipers** (front) with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, paired with **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny Minicab-specific widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with **Seibon carbon fiber splitter**, and **Voltex-style rear diffuser**). **Custom 3D-printed side skirts** to match the OEM Minicab wheel arches, painted in **Mitsubishi Racing Green (MRG) with matte black accents**.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami 15x6.5 ET+15 wheels** (Minicab-specific offsets) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 185/55R15 tires**. **Custom rear fender flares** (hand-rolled steel) to clear the wider track, with **Mitsubishi Galant VR-4 side markers** (JDM-spec) for OEM+ integration.

**Full carbon fiber interior overhaul**: **Seibon carbon fiber dashboard overlay**, **Bride Gias II bucket seats** (Minicab-specific mounting brackets), and **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** with **NRG quick-release hub**. **Custom aluminum shift knob** (machined from billet) with **Mitsubishi 4G15T shift pattern engraving**, paired with a **Sparco 6-point harness bar** (Minicab-specific bolt-in kit).
